name: Norwegian Molasses Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour and baking soda; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, cream brown sugar and margarine. Add egg product and molasses; beat until smooth. Stir in flour mixture. Cover; chill dough for 1 hour.
3. Shape dough into 48 balls; roll in granulated sugar. Place on greased and floured baking sheets about 2 inches apart. Lightly sprinkle dough with water. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes or until flattened. Remove from sheets; cool on wire racks. Decorate with Confectioners' Sugar Glaze and colored sprinkles if desired.
4. Makes 4 dozen cookies.
CONFECTIONERS' SUGAR GLAZE: Combine confectioners' sugar and skim milk.
